objective: Reach QQ Music search results, resolve a known OCR text anchor, click that anchor, and capture post-action evidence.

distilled_with.note: Model output was reviewed and normalized against live AUV validation before writing this skill file.

query.note: ASCII baseline avoids IME ambiguity during initial validation.

anchor_text.note: A known visible result title used as the first OCR anchor baseline.

steps.purpose: Reveal and focus the QQ Music search box through AX.
Submit a stable baseline query and wait for the search results state.
Resolve a screenshot OCR text anchor in result-list pixel space.
Project the OCR anchor back to logical coordinates and click it.
Capture post-click evidence for later inspect/review.

expected_signals: focusTextInput succeeds for query 搜索
findScreenText reports at least one match for I DRINK THE LIGHT
clickScreenText emits a logicalPoint note and click artifact
post-click screenshot shows the result row selected or highlighted
non_goals: Playback activation is not yet proven.
This recipe does not assert that the selected row starts playing.

known_limits.black_box_region: QQ Music result rows remain visually accessible but weakly exposed through AX.
known_limits.user_disturbance: clickScreenText uses pointer-level control and is intrusive on a live desktop, even though cursor restoration is attempted.
known_limits.fallback_needed: If OCR does not find the anchor, higher-level distillation must try another visible result title or a stronger visual strategy.
